MapPin, isDisabled: true }, { title: "Action Items", url: "#", icon: Sparkles, isDisabled: true }, ], navSecondary: [ { title: "Preferences", url: "#", icon: Settings, isDisabled: true }, { title: "Invite Members", url: "#", icon: UserPlus, isDisabled: true }, { title: "Help & Support", url: "#", icon: CircleHelp, isDisabled: true }, ], } export function AppSidebar({ onNavigate, currentView,
